docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS. FILED BY DEFENDANT PORVEN , LTD DBA PORCELANOSA USA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO DATE OF SERVICE PROVIDED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. SERVED AUG-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PORCELANOSA
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,511.35 (AMENDING TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME TO: PORVEN,LTD.) FILED BY BERRY, SHARON AS TO DEFENDANT PORVEN,LTD.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65) SERVED DEC-10-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PORVEN,LTD.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-01-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3,251.35 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MARCH 01, 2022, HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF SHARON BERRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PORCELANOSA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RACHEL VAUGHN (KITCHEN MANAGER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED AUG-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PORVEN , LTD DBA PORCELANOSA USA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHARON BERRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PORCELANOSA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PORVEN,LTD DBA AS PORCELANOSA IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PLAINTIFF SHOULD SERVE THE DEFENDANT AS PORVEN,LTD. ONLY SINCE THE MERGE HAPPEND IN 2017. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO CORRECT DEFENDANT NAME TO: PORVEN,LTD. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERRY, SHARON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,511.35 FILED BY BERRY, SHARON AS TO DEFENDANT PORCELANOSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
